g.aria-label: Gradient legend titled '生存確率' for fill color with values from 0.0 to 1.0
Title text '40歳開始 - 90歳時点の生存確率 (%)'
X-axis titled 'シナリオ' for a discrete scale with 9 values: 年金制度なし, 受給なし, 継続-60歳受給 (8万), 継続-65歳受給 (11万), 継続-70歳受給 (15万), ending with 未納-65歳受給 (7万)
Y-axis titled '(初期資産, 年間支出)' for a discrete scale with 3 values: (20000, 800), (10000, 400), (5000, 200)
